meaning: adj.童话式的 童话中才有的 优美无比的
examples: A prince turns into a frog in this cartoon fairytale.
After a whirlwind courtship and a fairytale wedding, the couple had settled down to an urban lifestyle.
Oh I forgot....this is just a fairytale!
Passed down over generations, the legends of the Dolomites read like fairytale accident reports.
The best animation went to Kipper and best film went to Fairytale: A True Story.
